responsibilities: Design and structure customized investment products including notes, swaps, and securitized instruments for institutional clients
Build pricing and valuation models for structured products incorporating embedded options and complex payoff structures
Collaborate with sales teams to translate client risk-return objectives into tailored structured product solutions
Analyze underlying collateral pools and cash flow waterfalls to assess credit risk in asset-backed and mortgage-backed securities
Prepare term sheets, marketing materials, and risk disclosures for new structured product issuances and offerings
Monitor secondary market pricing and liquidity of outstanding structured notes to support client servicing and reporting
Conduct scenario and sensitivity analysis to evaluate structured product performance under varying market conditions
Coordinate with legal, compliance, and risk teams to ensure structured product documentation meets regulatory requirements
